---
title: "classe 6 — Plan hebdomadaire"
---

::: {.callout-note}
**Phase 2 (à venir).** Le plan hebdomadaire des 12 Unités sera
généré à partir de `_resources/curriculum_outline.yml`.
:::

## Voir aussi

- [Page du cours](index.qmd)

::: {.vgwort-pixel}
```{=html}
<!-- VG Wort Zählmarke (slb) — public ID: 28bab522cdc4414a88c859f764669716 -->
<img src="https://vg09.met.vgwort.de/na/28bab522cdc4414a88c859f764669716"
     width="1" height="1" alt=""
     loading="eager"
     fetchpriority="high"
     decoding="async"
     style="position:absolute;visibility:hidden;" />
```
:::
